feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: Finale - Arteta conquis par Aubameyang : ‘Il a joué un rôle immense dans notre victoire’

link.title: Finale - Arteta conquis par Aubameyang : ‘Il a joué un rôle immense dans notre victoire’

entry.content: Mené au score par Chelsea, Arsenal s’est imposé grâce à un doublé de son capitaine Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang en finale de Coupe d’Angleterre. De quoi le faire prolonger son aventure chez les Gunners ? C’est ce que souhaite Mikel Arteta.
entry.summary: Mené au score par Chelsea, Arsenal s’est imposé grâce à un doublé de son capitaine Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang en finale de Coupe d’Angleterre. De quoi le faire prolonger son aventure chez les Gunners ? C’est ce que souhaite Mikel Arteta.

entry.title: Affaire Maddie: la police allemande fouille un jardin à Hanovre pour retrouver le corps

link.title: Affaire Maddie: la police allemande fouille un jardin à Hanovre pour retrouver le corps

entry.content: La police allemande fouille un jardin ouvrier à Hanovre dans le cadre de la disparition Maddie MacCann il y a 13 ans. Début juin, un allemand de 43 ans est devenu le principal suspect dans la disparition de l’enfant au Portugal en 2007. Il a un lourd passé de pédophile multirécidiviste et est actuellement en détention.
entry.summary: La police allemande fouille un jardin ouvrier à Hanovre dans le cadre de la disparition Maddie MacCann il y a 13 ans. Début juin, un allemand de 43 ans est devenu le principal suspect dans la disparition de l’enfant au Portugal en 2007. Il a un lourd passé de pédophile multirécidiviste et est actuellement en détention.

entry.title: Amar Singh ने जब Dr. Kalam से मुलाकात कर 2008 में UPA सरकार गिरने से बचा ली थी वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Amar Singh ने जब Dr. Kalam से मुलाकात कर 2008 में UPA सरकार गिरने से बचा ली थी वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
An articulate and a resourceful politician, Amar Singh rose in political prominence after Samajwadi Party supported the Indo-US nuclear deal following the withdrawal of support by Left parties to the Congress-led UPA.Watch video,
समाजवादी पार्टी के पूर्व नेता और राज्यसभा सांसद अमर सिंह अब इस दुनिया में नहीं रहें. शनिवार यानी 1 अगस्त को उनका निधन हो गया. अमर सिंह को 2008 में कांग्रेस के नेतृत्व वाली यूपीए गठबंधन सरकार बचाने के लिए हमेशा याद किया जाता है. उस समय समाजवादी पार्टी के राज्यसभा सदस्य अमर सिंह ने ही यूपीए सरकार को गिरने से बचा लिया था.देखें वीडियो
#AmarSingh #AbdulKalam #UPAGovt
entry.summary: An articulate and a resourceful politician, Amar Singh rose in political prominence after Samajwadi Party supported the Indo-US nuclear deal following the withdrawal of support by Left parties to the Congress-led UPA.Watch video, समाजवादी पार्टी के पूर्व नेता और राज्यसभा सांसद अमर सिंह अब इस दुनिया में नहीं रहें. शनिवार यानी 1 अगस्त को उनका निधन हो गया. अमर सिंह को 2008 में कांग्रेस के नेतृत्व वाली यूपीए गठबंधन सरकार बचाने के लिए हमेशा याद किया जाता है. उस समय समाजवादी पार्टी के राज्यसभा सदस्य अमर सिंह ने ही यूपीए सरकार को गिरने से बचा लिया था.देखें वीडियो #AmarSingh #AbdulKalam #UPAGovt

entry.title: Ayu Ting Ting Senang Rilis Single Baru di Label Baru

link.title: Ayu Ting Ting Senang Rilis Single Baru di Label Baru

entry.content:
Ayu Ting Ting merilis single terbaru berjudul Cemburu Mantanmu. Hal itu ia umumkan bersamaan dengan bergabungnya Ayu di label Swara Bintang.
Link terkait:
Ayu Ting Ting kini resmi bergabung dalam label Swara Bintang yang merupakan label khusus penyanyi dangdut dan melayu. Selengkapnya dalam video ini.
#AyuTingting #RilisSingleBaru
Video Editor: Dewi Yuliantini
===================================

entry.title: Trois portes de sorties pour Philippe Coutinho, scandale sanitaire en deuxième division espagnole

link.title: Trois portes de sorties pour Philippe Coutinho, scandale sanitaire en deuxième division espagnole

entry.content: Philippe Coutinho pourrait rebondir en Premier League, la deuxième division espagnole en pleine tourmente et le Barça a fixé sa priorité pour se renforcer en défense, retrouvez dans votre revue de presse Foot Mercato les dernières informations de la presse sportive européenne.
entry.summary: Philippe Coutinho pourrait rebondir en Premier League, la deuxième division espagnole en pleine tourmente et le Barça a fixé sa priorité pour se renforcer en défense, retrouvez dans votre revue de presse Foot Mercato les dernières informations de la presse sportive européenne.

entry.title: Askerlerle bayramlaşan Bakan Soylu’dan açıklama: Göreceksiniz yakın zamanda…

link.title: Askerlerle bayramlaşan Bakan Soylu’dan açıklama: Göreceksiniz yakın zamanda…

entry.content:
İçişleri Bakanı Süleyman Soylu, Kurban Bayramı nedeniyle Siirt Pervari Doğan Üs Bölgesini ziyaret etti. Bakan Soylu’yu burada Siirt Valisi Osman Hacıbeştaşoğlu, İl Jandarma Komutanı Tuğgeneral Hüseyin Hilmi Atabay, İl Emniyet Müdürü Saruhan Kızılay, Pervari Kaymakam Vekili Mehmet Tunç, AK Parti İl Başkanı Ekrem Olgaç, İl Genel Meclis Başkanı Cangir Bayram, Pervari Belediye Başkanı Teyyar Özcan, Beğendik Belediye Başkanı Gürgün Özdemir ve bölge halkı tarafından karşılandı.
Karşılamanın ardından Üs Bölgesinde kurban kesilerek dua edildi. Bakan Soylu daha sonra üst bölgesinde asker ve vatandaşlarla çay içip, sohbet etti.
‘Türkiye’de ummadığınız gelişmeler yaşanacak’
Burada konuşan Bakan Soylu, birlik ve beraberlik mesajları vererek, "Eğer biz huzurluysak Ortadoğu huzurludur. Biz huzurluysak Kafkasya huzurludur. Biz güçlüysek mağdurların ve mazlumların başı diktir. Biz Müslümanız elhamdülillah. Biz büyük bir medeniyetin çocuklarıyız. Biz komşu biliriz, akraba biliriz, dost biliriz, emanetin ne olduğunu biliriz.
Bilmeyenlere öğretmek görevi de dinimizce bize verilmiştir. Emir şöyledir: İyilikleri anlatacaksınız, kötülüklerden sakındıracaksınız. Biz nerede durduğumuzu, nerede oturduğumuzu, hangi adrese bağlı olduğumuzu biliriz. Bizim adresimizde en ufak bir sapma yoktur. Bizim adresimizde tarif edilemeyen bir durum söz konusu değildir.
Biz navigasyonla yol bulmaya çalışan bir millet değiliz. Bizim yolumuz başından beri belli, bu kadar açık ve net. Adresimiz belli, kimliğimiz belli. Biz iyilik medeniyetinin çocuklarıyız.
Dostluk, ahbaplık, komşuluk, yarenlik, akraba, büyük-küçük nedir, biliriz. Bunları bilmeyenlerin bu coğrafyaya hakimiyetini bu kahramanlarla beraber engelledik’‘ dedi.
‘Yeter ki biz huzurumuzu elimizde tutalım’
Bakan Soylu, büyük adımlar atmanın zamanı olduğunu söyleyerek, ’‘Göreceksiniz, Türkiye’de hiç birinizin ummadığı gelişmeler yaşanacak. Türkiye çok yakın bir zamanda dünyanın cazibe merkezini haline gelecek, yeter ki biz huzurumuzu elimizde tutalım" diye konuştu.
entry.summary: İçişleri Bakanı Süleyman Soylu, Kurban Bayramı nedeniyle Siirt Pervari Doğan Üs Bölgesini ziyaret etti. Bakan Soylu’yu burada Siirt Valisi Osman Hacıbeştaşoğlu, İl Jandarma Komutanı Tuğgeneral Hüseyin Hilmi Atabay, İl Emniyet Müdürü Saruhan Kızılay, Pervari Kaymakam Vekili Mehmet Tunç, AK Parti İl Başkanı Ekrem Olgaç, İl Genel Meclis Başkanı Cangir Bayram, Pervari Belediye Başkanı Teyyar Özcan, Beğendik Belediye Başkanı Gürgün Özdemir ve bölge halkı tarafından karşılandı. Karşılamanın ardından Üs Bölgesinde kurban kesilerek dua edildi. Bakan Soylu daha sonra üst bölgesinde asker ve vatandaşlarla çay içip, sohbet etti. ‘Türkiye’de ummadığınız gelişmeler yaşanacak’ Burada konuşan Bakan Soylu, birlik ve beraberlik mesajları vererek, "Eğer biz huzurluysak Ortadoğu huzurludur. Biz huzurluysak Kafkasya huzurludur. Biz güçlüysek mağdurların ve mazlumların başı diktir. Biz Müslümanız elhamdülillah. Biz büyük bir medeniyetin çocuklarıyız. Biz komşu biliriz, akraba biliriz, dost biliriz, emanetin ne olduğunu biliriz. Bilmeyenlere öğretmek görevi de dinimizce bize verilmiştir. Emir şöyledir: İyilikleri anlatacaksınız, kötülüklerden sakındıracaksınız. Biz nerede durduğumuzu, nerede oturduğumuzu, hangi adrese bağlı olduğumuzu biliriz. Bizim adresimizde en ufak bir sapma yoktur. Bizim adresimizde tarif edilemeyen bir durum söz konusu değildir. Biz navigasyonla yol bulmaya çalışan bir millet değiliz. Bizim yolumuz başından beri belli, bu kadar açık ve net. Adresimiz belli, kimliğimiz belli. Biz iyilik medeniyetinin çocuklarıyız. Dostluk, ahbaplık, komşuluk, yarenlik, akraba, büyük-küçük nedir, biliriz. Bunları bilmeyenlerin bu coğrafyaya hakimiyetini bu kahramanlarla beraber engelledik’‘ dedi. ‘Yeter ki biz huzurumuzu elimizde tutalım’ Bakan Soylu, büyük adımlar atmanın zamanı olduğunu söyleyerek, ’‘Göreceksiniz, Türkiye’de hiç birinizin ummadığı gelişmeler yaşanacak. Türkiye çok yakın bir zamanda dünyanın cazibe merkezini haline gelecek, yeter ki biz huzurumuzu elimizde tutalım" diye konuştu.

entry.title: Deewangi Episode 39 Teaser 5th Aug 2020 Deewangi Episode 39 Promo

link.title: Deewangi Episode 39 Teaser 5th Aug 2020 Deewangi Episode 39 Promo

entry.content:
Working as a bus hostess, she meets Sultan Durrani; soon-to -be politician with great influence. Drawn by her presence, Sultan falls for Nageen, at first sight. Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh.
Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace?

Unaware of the intensity of what is to come next, he publicly expresses his emotions to Nageen. The following events change the course of their lives and career. With the support from her friends, Nageen attempts to start afresh. Unable to resolve his difference with Nageen, Sultan sets on the mission to find her again. Will Nageen and Sultan’s second interaction be as tragic as the first? Or will the storm of feelings finally find peace? ================================================= Top searches for Drama Serial Deewangi Episode 38 ================================================= 1. entry.title: Pemkab Lumajang Gandeng Petrokimia Tingkatkan Produksi Pertanian

link.title: Pemkab Lumajang Gandeng Petrokimia Tingkatkan Produksi Pertanian

entry.content:
LUMAJANG, KOMPAS.TV Pemerintah Kabupaten Lumajang, Jawa Timur, menggandeng perusahaan pupuk PT. Petrokimia Gresik untuk meningkatkan produktivitas pertanian.
Keduanya bekerja sama meluncurkan produk pupuk cair organik Phonska Oca, yang memiliki kandungan yang lengkap. Pupuk cair organik Phonska Oca merupakan gabungan antara pupuk majemuk NPK dan pupuk organik dalam bentuk cair.
Pupuk ini memiliki kandungan C-Organik minimal 6 persen, unsur hara makro Nitrogen, Fosfor, Kalium dan diperkaya unsur mikro serta mikroba yang bermanfaat untuk tanaman. Dengan demikian, pupuk cair organik Phonska OCA dapat menjadi solusi praktis bagi petani.
Bupati Lumajang, Thoriqul Haq, langsung mencoba menyemprotkan pupuk NPK dan organik cair phonska oca di lahan persawahan, di Desa Karangsari, Kecamatan Sukodono, Kabupaten Lumajang.
Dalam kesempatan tersebut, Bupati Thoriq mengaku senang menjalin kerja sama dengan pihak perusahaan pupuk Petrokimia, karena lahan pertanian milik petani tetap produktif.
Menurut Bupati Thoriq, hal tersebut merupakan salah satu bentuk perhatian Pemerintah Daerah kepada petani dengan menyediakan pupuk yang cukup optimal.
Dengan pupuk tersebut, petani bisa meningkatkan produktivitas pertaniannya secara berkelanjutan, terutama di tengah ancaman krisis pangan akibat pandemi Covid-19.
Para petani mengaku bersyukur dengan adanya produk pupuk cair organik dan berharap pupuk tersebut dapat membantu mereka dalam meningkatkan produktivitas.
#PupukCair #PupukOrganik #Petrokimia #PemkabLumajang
entry.summary: LUMAJANG, KOMPAS.TV Pemerintah Kabupaten Lumajang, Jawa Timur, menggandeng perusahaan pupuk PT. Petrokimia Gresik untuk meningkatkan produktivitas pertanian. Keduanya bekerja sama meluncurkan produk pupuk cair organik Phonska Oca, yang memiliki kandungan yang lengkap. Pupuk cair organik Phonska Oca merupakan gabungan antara pupuk majemuk NPK dan pupuk organik dalam bentuk cair. Pupuk ini memiliki kandungan C-Organik minimal 6 persen, unsur hara makro Nitrogen, Fosfor, Kalium dan diperkaya unsur mikro serta mikroba yang bermanfaat untuk tanaman. Dengan demikian, pupuk cair organik Phonska OCA dapat menjadi solusi praktis bagi petani. Bupati Lumajang, Thoriqul Haq, langsung mencoba menyemprotkan pupuk NPK dan organik cair phonska oca di lahan persawahan, di Desa Karangsari, Kecamatan Sukodono, Kabupaten Lumajang. Dalam kesempatan tersebut, Bupati Thoriq mengaku senang menjalin kerja sama dengan pihak perusahaan pupuk Petrokimia, karena lahan pertanian milik petani tetap produktif. Menurut Bupati Thoriq, hal tersebut merupakan salah satu bentuk perhatian Pemerintah Daerah kepada petani dengan menyediakan pupuk yang cukup optimal. Dengan pupuk tersebut, petani bisa meningkatkan produktivitas pertaniannya secara berkelanjutan, terutama di tengah ancaman krisis pangan akibat pandemi Covid-19. Para petani mengaku bersyukur dengan adanya produk pupuk cair organik dan berharap pupuk tersebut dapat membantu mereka dalam meningkatkan produktivitas. #PupukCair #PupukOrganik #Petrokimia #PemkabLumajang

entry.content: During these uncertain times during COVID, you may be down in the dumps and just not sure what to do. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.
entry.summary: During these uncertain times during COVID, you may be down in the dumps and just not sure what to do. Buzz60’s Mercer Morrison has the story.

entry.title: PM Modi’s Pakistani sister sends him ‘rakhi’

link.title: PM Modi’s Pakistani sister sends him ‘rakhi’

entry.content: Ahead of the auspicious occasion of ‘Rakshabandhan’, Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s sister from Pakistan Qamar Mohsin Shaikh, who lives in Ahmedabad, sent him ‘rakhi’ by post. Qamar Mohsin Shaikh said, “I have come to know that my rakhi and book reached to Prime Minister Modi. I wished that I could tie 25th rakhi to Prime Minister personally but due to corona, everyone is facing a problem. Whatever it may be, I’ll pray that the next five years go so well for him that the whole world recognizes the positive decisions he made.” Qamar also sent a book ‘Qamar Jahan’, by a famous writer along with ‘rakhi’.
entry.summary: Ahead of the auspicious occasion of ‘Rakshabandhan’, Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s sister from Pakistan Qamar Mohsin Shaikh, who lives in Ahmedabad, sent him ‘rakhi’ by post. Qamar Mohsin Shaikh said, “I have come to know that my rakhi and book reached to Prime Minister Modi. I wished that I could tie 25th rakhi to Prime Minister personally but due to corona, everyone is facing a problem. Whatever it may be, I’ll pray that the next five years go so well for him that the whole world recognizes the positive decisions he made.” Qamar also sent a book ‘Qamar Jahan’, by a famous writer along with ‘rakhi’.

entry.title: This Watch Was the Rolex of China

link.title: This Watch Was the Rolex of China

entry.content:
The Shanghai watch was the first mechanical watch completely designed and made in China. It was so prized that it was that no one would marry a man without a Shanghai watch. The timepiece was worn by Chinese leaders like Mao Zedong, Deng Xiaoping, and Zhou Enlai.
We went to the factory in Shanghai to see how these historical watches are made.
If you liked this video, we have more factory stories, including:
Exclusive Look at How Feiyue Kung Fu Shoes Are Made
Inside the Vitasoy Factory
#china #factory #watch
Follow us on Instagram for behind-the-scenes moments:
Stay updated on Twitter:
Join the conversation on Facebook:
Have story ideas? Send them to us at hello@goldthread2.com
Producer: Jessica Novia
Videographer: Shirley Xu and Frentee Ji
Editor: Joel Roche
Music: Audio Network
entry.summary: The Shanghai watch was the first mechanical watch completely designed and made in China. It was so prized that it was that no one would marry a man without a Shanghai watch. The timepiece was worn by Chinese leaders like Mao Zedong, Deng Xiaoping, and Zhou Enlai. We went to the factory in Shanghai to see how these historical watches are made. If you liked this video, we have more factory stories, including: Exclusive Look at How Feiyue Kung Fu Shoes Are Made Inside the Vitasoy Factory #china #factory #watch Follow us on Instagram for behind-the-scenes moments: Stay updated on Twitter: Join the conversation on Facebook: Have story ideas? Send them to us at hello@goldthread2.com Producer: Jessica Novia Videographer: Shirley Xu and Frentee Ji Editor: Joel Roche Music: Audio Network

entry.title: Online Class : ಹಳ್ಳಿ ಶಾಲೆಗೆ ಆನ್ ಲೈನ್ ಶಿಕ್ಷಣ ಅಸಾಧ್ಯ-ಅಸಂಭವ Oneindia Kannada

entry.content:
ಹಳ್ಳಿ ಮಕ್ಕಳಿಗೆ ಕನಸಾದ online ವಿಧ್ಯಾಭ್ಯಾಸ , corona ಕಿತ್ತು ತಿನ್ನೋ ಕಷ್ಟ .. ನುಂಗಲಾರದ ತುತ್ತು
ಕೈಗೆ ಎಟುಕದ ನಕ್ಷತ್ರ ಹಿಂಗಾದರೆ ವಿಧ್ಯಾಭ್ಯಾಸ ಬಾರಿ ಕನಸು ಮಾತರ
Dreaming online for village children, corona is difficult to eat ..
Hanging out of the hands of a stellar student

entry.title: Katy Perry REVEALS ‘What Makes A Woman’ Song Is Dedicated To Her Daughter

link.title: Katy Perry REVEALS ‘What Makes A Woman’ Song Is Dedicated To Her Daughter

entry.content:
Katy Perry is going to welcome her baby girl soon, but that’s not stopping the 35-year-old singer from promoting her sixth Smile studio album out next month. Check out the video to learn why Smile’s What Made a Woman is a special mommy-to-be song.
Log On To Our Official Website :
For More Such News & Gossips Subscribe now! :
Lehren On Podcast:
Download The ‘Lehren App’:
Facebook :
Twitter:
entry.summary: Katy Perry is going to welcome her baby girl soon, but that’s not stopping the 35-year-old singer from promoting her sixth Smile studio album out next month. Check out the video to learn why Smile’s What Made a Woman is a special mommy-to-be song. The next named storm of the 2020 Atlantic hurricane season is Isaias. Here’s how tropical storms get their names.

entry.title: Rajasthan Political Crisis: Sachin Pilot ने CP Joshi को यूं दी जन्मदिन की बधाई वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Rajasthan Political Crisis: Sachin Pilot ने CP Joshi को यूं दी जन्मदिन की बधाई वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Political crisis continues in Rajasthan, meanwhile, on 29 July, today, Rajasthan Assembly Speaker CP Joshi is celebrating his 70th birthday. On this occasion, Rajasthan Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot and former Deputy Chief Minister Sachin Pilot have tweeted and congratulated them.
राजस्थान में सियासी संकट के बीच काफी उथल-पुथल मची हुई है. इस बीच 29 जुलाई यानी आज राजस्थान विधानसभा अध्यक्ष सीपी जोशी अपना 70वां जन्मदिन मना रहे हैं. इस मौके पर राजस्थान के मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत और पूर्व उपमुख्यमंत्री सचिन पायलट ने ट्वीट कर उन्हें बधाई दी है.
#CPJoshiBirthDay #Sachinpilot #Rajasthan
entry.summary: Political crisis continues in Rajasthan, meanwhile, on 29 July, today, Rajasthan Assembly Speaker CP Joshi is celebrating his 70th birthday. On this occasion, Rajasthan Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot and former Deputy Chief Minister Sachin Pilot have tweeted and congratulated them. राजस्थान में सियासी संकट के बीच काफी उथल-पुथल मची हुई है. इस बीच 29 जुलाई यानी आज राजस्थान विधानसभा अध्यक्ष सीपी जोशी अपना 70वां जन्मदिन मना रहे हैं. इस मौके पर राजस्थान के मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत और पूर्व उपमुख्यमंत्री सचिन पायलट ने ट्वीट कर उन्हें बधाई दी है. #CPJoshiBirthDay #Sachinpilot #Rajasthan

entry.title: En Nouvelle Aquitaine, évolution inquiétante de l’épidémie qui touche désormais les 15-44 ans

link.title: En Nouvelle Aquitaine, évolution inquiétante de l’épidémie qui touche désormais les 15-44 ans

entry.content:
En Nouvelle-Aquitaine, les médecins voient affluer en consultation de plus en plus de patients jeunes pour des symptômes liés au Covid-19. Ce phénomène est d’autant plus inquiétant qu’il augmente également le risque de contamination des personnes plus fragiles.
Retrouvez "Toute l’info du week-end" sur :
entry.summary: En Nouvelle-Aquitaine, les médecins voient affluer en consultation de plus en plus de patients jeunes pour des symptômes liés au Covid-19. Ce phénomène est d’autant plus inquiétant qu’il augmente également le risque de contamination des personnes plus fragiles. Retrouvez "Toute l’info du week-end" sur :

entry.title: A crocodile found inside the toilet of a house, released into the river Oneindia News

link.title: A crocodile found inside the toilet of a house, released into the river Oneindia News

entry.content: Firozabad: A crocodile was found inside a toilet of a house in Mohabbatpur village. The reptile was later rescued by an NGO and released into the river. A villager in Uttar Pradesh’s Firozabad district ran screaming for help when he saw a five-foot-long crocodile cosily perched in the toilet of his house. Other family members who saw the strange guest in the toilet also panicked and called their neighbours to help in the incident which occurred in Mohabbatpur village early on Wednesday. The villagers said the crocodile had perhaps wandered out of the village pond and found shelter in the toilet.
entry.summary: Firozabad: A crocodile was found inside a toilet of a house in Mohabbatpur village. The reptile was later rescued by an NGO and released into the river. A villager in Uttar Pradesh’s Firozabad district ran screaming for help when he saw a five-foot-long crocodile cosily perched in the toilet of his house. Other family members who saw the strange guest in the toilet also panicked and called their neighbours to help in the incident which occurred in Mohabbatpur village early on Wednesday. The villagers said the crocodile had perhaps wandered out of the village pond and found shelter in the toilet.

entry.title: Rajasthan Crisis: Congress के दो और MLA पहुंचे जैसलमेर, BJP पर लगाया ये आरोप वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Rajasthan Crisis: Congress के दो और MLA पहुंचे जैसलमेर, BJP पर लगाया ये आरोप वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
Political crisis continues in Rajasthan. All the MLAs of Congress belonging to Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot’s camp are now being shifted to Jaisalmer. A large number of Congress MLAs reached Jaisalmer on Friday. After this, two more MLAs of the Gehlot camp have reached Jaisalmer. Tight security arrangements have been made in Jaisalmer. It is being told that all these MLAs will stop here till the commencement of the assembly session i.e. till 14 August.
राजस्थान में सियासी संकट जारी है. मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत के खेमे वाले कांग्रेस के सभी विधायकों को अब जैसलमेर शिफ्ट किया जा रहा है. शुक्रवार को बड़ी संख्या में कांग्रेस के विधायक जैसलमेर पहुंचे. इसके बाद अब गहलोत खेमे के दो और विधायक जैसलमेर पहुंच गए हैं. जैसलमेर में सुरक्षा के कड़े इंतजाम किए गए हैं. बताया जा रहा है कि ये सभी विधायक विधानसभा सत्र शुरू होने तक यानी 14 अगस्त तक यहीं रुकेंगे.
#RajasthanPoliticalCrisis #CongressMLA #AshokGehlot
entry.summary: Political crisis continues in Rajasthan. All the MLAs of Congress belonging to Chief Minister Ashok Gehlot’s camp are now being shifted to Jaisalmer. A large number of Congress MLAs reached Jaisalmer on Friday. After this, two more MLAs of the Gehlot camp have reached Jaisalmer. Tight security arrangements have been made in Jaisalmer. It is being told that all these MLAs will stop here till the commencement of the assembly session i.e. till 14 August. राजस्थान में सियासी संकट जारी है. मुख्यमंत्री अशोक गहलोत के खेमे वाले कांग्रेस के सभी विधायकों को अब जैसलमेर शिफ्ट किया जा रहा है. शुक्रवार को बड़ी संख्या में कांग्रेस के विधायक जैसलमेर पहुंचे. इसके बाद अब गहलोत खेमे के दो और विधायक जैसलमेर पहुंच गए हैं. जैसलमेर में सुरक्षा के कड़े इंतजाम किए गए हैं. बताया जा रहा है कि ये सभी विधायक विधानसभा सत्र शुरू होने तक यानी 14 अगस्त तक यहीं रुकेंगे. #RajasthanPoliticalCrisis #CongressMLA #AshokGehlot
